'''ngawatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivorybill|ivorybill]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivorybill|ivorybill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngawatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæwæthæth|ngæwæthæth]] || [[word:ngæwæthæj|ngæwæthæj]] || [[word:ngæwæthæsh|ngæwæthæsh]] || [[word:ngæwæthæ|ngæwæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawawathath|ngawawathath]] || [[word:ngawawathaj|ngawawathaj]] || [[word:ngawawathash|ngawawathash]] || [[word:ngawawatha|ngawawatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawathath|ngawathath]] || [[word:ngawathaj|ngawathaj]] || [[word:ngawathash|ngawathash]] || [[word:ngawatha|ngawatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawafthath|ngawafthath]] || [[word:ngawafthaj|ngawafthaj]] || [[word:ngawafthash|ngawafthash]] || [[word:ngawafthaf|ngawafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngawathatha|ngawathatha]] || [[word:ngawathaja|ngawathaja]] || [[word:ngawathasha|ngawathasha]] || [[word:ngawathaka|ngawathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngawathath|ngawathath]] || [[word:ngawathaj|ngawathaj]] || [[word:ngawathash|ngawathash]] || [[word:ngawatha|ngawatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngawathathal|ngawathathal]] || [[word:ngawathajal|ngawathajal]] || [[word:ngawathashal|ngawathashal]] || [[word:ngawathakal|ngawathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngawathathatha|ngawathathatha]] || [[word:ngawathajaja|ngawathajaja]] || [[word:ngawathashasha|ngawathashasha]] || [[word:ngawathaka|ngawathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngawathathan|ngawathathan]] || [[word:ngawathajan|ngawathajan]] || [[word:ngawathashan|ngawathashan]] || [[word:ngawathakan|ngawathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngawathathaoro|ngawathathaoro]] || [[word:ngawathajaoro|ngawathajaoro]] || [[word:ngawathashaoro|ngawathashaoro]] || [[word:ngawathakaoro|ngawathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
